element.name: TdlgImport.ApplyDarkMode
element.short: Apply dark theme to the UI

element.name: TdlgImport.IsRequiredFilledSource
element.short: Check if the required fields are filled

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadFields
element.short: Setup mapping grid with source file fields and target fields

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadTargetFields
element.short: Load the list of target fields for a target table

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadTargetTables
element.short: Load a list of target tables

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadSearchTables
element.short: Load a list of tables that could be used to validate data

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadLookupFields
element.short: Load the list of fields from a lookup table

element.name: TdlgImport.LoadImportSettings
element.short: Load general import settings into UI controls

element.name: TdlgImport.UpdateImportSettings
element.short: Show or hide controls of general import settings according to filetype

element.name: TdlgImport.SetImportSettings
element.short: Set general import settings from UI controls

element.name: TdlgImport.PreviewRows
element.short: Load and show data preview before importing

element.name: TdlgImport.PreparePreview
element.short: Prepare the TStringGrid to receive data preview

element.name: TdlgImport.GetSheetsList
element.short: Get the list of sheets of a spreadsheet file

element.name: TdlgImport.GetFieldSettings
element.short: Load and display settings from a mapped field

element.name: TdlgImport.InferColumnType
element.short: Return the field type inferred from data type

element.name: TdlgImport.ImportMapCount
element.short: Return the number of mapped fields checked to import

element.name: TdlgImport.ImportData
element.short: Execute the data import

element.name: TdlgImport.DoProgress
element.short: Show progress of the import

element.name: TdlgImport.CollectColumnStats
element.short: Try to infer data types based on a data sample

element.name: TdlgImport.AddPreviewRow
element.short: Add row to the data preview grid

element.name: TdlgImport.AddImportRow
element.short: Add data record to the database table

element.name: TdlgImport.FFieldMap
element.short: Map of fields to be imported with field-specific settings

element.name: TdlgImport.FTableType
element.short: Table that will receive the data to be imported

element.name: TdlgImport.FImportSettings
element.short: General import settings

element.name: TdlgImport.FFieldIndex
element.short: Current/selected field index

element.name: TdlgImport.ColStats
element.short: Store the stats to infer field type

element.name: TdlgImport.FFileFormat
element.short: The filetype of the source file to be imported

element.name: TdlgImport.FSourceFile
element.short: Path of source file to be imported

element.name: TdlgImport.FImporter
element.short: Generic importer

element.name: TdlgImport.FieldMapLoaded
element.short: Flag used to avoid some operations before the field map is fully loaded

element.name: TdlgImport.FSavedSettings
element.short: Name of the saved settings profile selected
